# TrackAudit

> Google Ads conversion tracking audit and monitoring platform for PPC agencies.

TrackAudit is a SaaS tool that helps digital marketing agencies and PPC professionals monitor, audit, and fix Google Ads conversion tracking issues before they cause wasted ad spend. It runs 50+ automated checks daily across all connected Google Ads accounts and surfaces issues like broken tags, missing consent mode configuration, enhanced conversion misconfiguration, and data quality problems.

## What TrackAudit does

- Audits Google Ads conversion tracking setups against Google's best practices
- Monitors consent mode V2 compliance across all accounts in real time
- Detects broken, missing, or duplicated conversion tracking tags
- Checks enhanced conversions configuration and readiness
- Monitors GA4 integration and cross-platform data consistency
- Identifies bid strategy campaigns with insufficient conversion data
- Generates white-label PDF audit reports with agency branding
- Sends real-time alerts via Slack and email when tracking breaks
- Provides a multi-account dashboard for agencies managing many clients

## Who uses TrackAudit

PPC agencies, digital marketing agencies, freelance paid media specialists, and in-house performance marketing teams managing Google Ads accounts.

## Key capabilities

- 50+ automated tracking checks per audit
- Daily and real-time monitoring modes
- Multi-account MCC-aware dashboard
- White-label client reports with custom logo and branding
- Slack and email alert delivery
- Health scores per account with 90-day history
- API access for custom integrations
- Team collaboration with role-based access

## Pricing

- **Starter** — $49/month: up to 3 Google Ads accounts, daily audits, email alerts, basic reports
- **Agency** — $149/month: up to 15 accounts, real-time monitoring, Slack alerts, white-label reports, API access
- **Agency Pro** — $299/month: unlimited accounts, priority support, custom branding, dedicated account manager

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

## Common questions

**Q: What tracking issues does TrackAudit detect?**
A: Broken or missing conversion tags, duplicate conversion actions, incorrect conversion categories, missing auto-tagging, consent mode V2 non-compliance, missing enhanced conversions setup, GA4 integration gaps, smart bidding campaigns with insufficient conversion data, and conversion value tracking misconfiguration.

**Q: Does TrackAudit support multiple Google Ads accounts?**
A: Yes. TrackAudit is built for agencies managing multiple client accounts. It supports Google Ads MCC (manager account) hierarchies and provides a unified dashboard across all accounts.

**Q: How does the white-label reporting work?**
A: Agencies upload their logo, set brand colours, and add their agency name. All generated PDF reports carry the agency's branding. Clients see the agency brand, not TrackAudit.

**Q: What platforms does TrackAudit support?**
A: Currently Google Ads and GA4. Support for Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and other platforms is on the roadmap.

**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: Yes — 14 days free with full Agency plan features. No credit card required.

## Technical details

- Connects to Google Ads via OAuth 2.0
- Uses the Google Ads API (GAQL) for account data
- Runs on a secure cloud infrastructure with 99.9% uptime SLA
- All data is encrypted in transit and at rest

## Contact and links

- Website: https://trackaudit.io
- Start free trial: https://trackaudit.io/signup
- Login: https://trackaudit.io/login
